Elyon Schools

Excellence in Education

HomeAboutAdmissionsGalleryNews & EventsContact
Established 1994

About Elyon Schools

For over 30 years, Elyon Schools has been committed to providing quality education that nurtures the whole child - academically, socially, and morally. Our journey from a small nursery school to a comprehensive educational institution is a testament to our dedication to excellence.

Our Story

Elyon Schools was founded in 1994 by a group of visionary educators who believed in providing quality education that goes beyond textbooks. Starting with just 50 students in a small building, we have grown into one of the most respected educational institutions in Nigeria.

Today, Elyon Schools serves over 1,500 students from nursery through secondary levels. Our modern campus features well-equipped classrooms, science laboratories, a library, computer labs, sports facilities, and recreational areas that support holistic development.

Our alumni have gone on to become doctors, engineers, lawyers, entrepreneurs, and leaders in various fields, carrying with them the values instilled during their time at Elyon Schools.

Our Mission

To provide quality education that develops the intellectual, moral, social, and physical potential of every child, preparing them to become responsible citizens and leaders who will contribute positively to society.

Our Vision

To be the leading educational institution in Nigeria, recognized for academic excellence, character development, and producing graduates who are innovative, ethical, and globally competitive.

Our Core Values

These values guide everything we do at Elyon Schools and shape the character of our students.

Excellence

We strive for the highest standards in everything we do, from academics to character development.

Integrity

We uphold honesty, transparency, and moral uprightness in all our dealings.

Innovation

We embrace modern teaching methods and technology to enhance learning outcomes.

Community

We foster a sense of belonging and partnership among students, parents, and staff.

Our Journey

Key milestones in our 30-year history of educational excellence.

1994

School Founded

Elyon Schools was established with just 50 students and a vision for excellence.

1994

School Founded

Elyon Schools was established with just 50 students and a vision for excellence.

2000

Primary Section Added

Expanded to include primary education, growing our student body significantly.

2005

Secondary School Launched

Opened our secondary school section to provide complete education journey.

2005

Secondary School Launched

Opened our secondary school section to provide complete education journey.

2010

New Campus Completed

Moved to our current modern campus with state-of-the-art facilities.

2018

STEM Lab Inaugurated

Opened our advanced science and technology laboratory.

2018

STEM Lab Inaugurated

Opened our advanced science and technology laboratory.

2024

30th Anniversary

Celebrating three decades of educational excellence and thousands of successful alumni.

School Leadership

Meet the dedicated leaders who guide our school community.

Dr. Emmanuel Okafor

Principal

Dr. Okafor brings over 25 years of educational leadership experience, with a Ph.D. in Educational Administration.

Our Achievements

98% WAEC Pass Rate

Consistently high performance in national examinations.

Multiple State Championships

Winners in debates, quiz competitions, and sports events.

5,000+ Successful Alumni

Graduates excelling in universities and careers worldwide.

Join Our School Community

Discover how Elyon Schools can provide your child with the education and values they need to succeed in life.

Nurturing young minds from Nursery through Secondary education. Building tomorrow's leaders with excellence in academics, character, and values.
